  "R1.5": "Proposes a clear structural reorganization with per-section rationale, moving the problem statement to the top and restructuring the flow logically.",
  "R1.6": "Improves several problem areas like hedging and vague descriptions but doesn't achieve a full copy-edit pass.",
  "RX.1": "Effectively discloses uncertainty by highlighting unverified claims and suggesting needed evidence.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without any drift, addressing all relevant points.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content introduced; suggestions prevent potential misunderstandings.",

rationale.R1.5: Proposes a clear structural reorganization with per-section rationale, moving the problem statement to the top and restructuring the flow logically.
rationale.R1.6: Improves several problem areas like hedging and vague descriptions but doesn't achieve a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively discloses uncertainty by highlighting unverified claims and suggesting needed evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without any drift, addressing all relevant points.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; suggestions prevent potential misunderstandings.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack annotation, reducing traceability.
